nodes.label: Pre-Budget ICT Discourse 2083 Panel Discussion Event Photo
nodes.description: Panel discussion at the Pre-Budget ICT Discourse 2083 event held at Hotel Himalaya, Lalitpur on Thursday 30 April 2025 (2083 Baisakh 17). Theme: Accelerating Digital Transformation - Strategic ICT Priorities for Budget 2083/84. Five panelists seated in chairs on stage with branded backdrop showing IFN logo.
